item.name: Prayer Cushion
item.description:
It is something of a marvel to watch these pale wavekin glide effortlessly through the sea.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: These creatures are cousins to the striped rays used by the Kojin as mounts. Due to their translucent flesh, seen as testament to their divinity, they are revered as living seats for the most sagacious.
